meta.title: Babylon Translation Agency | Lutsk
meta.description: Babylon Translation Agency in Lutsk, Ukraine: translation into all world languages, notarization of translations, document apostille, certificate of no criminal record, professional document legalization. Phone: 096 344 1021.

hero.tagline: We translate documents into every language of the world and handle all the formalities for you — from notarization to apostille and legalization.
